scripts.prebuild:tools: npm run icons:sync && npm run og:generate && npm run sitemap:generate
scripts.install:tools: npm ci --prefix tools/kalorienrechner && npm ci --prefix tools/makrorechner && npm ci --prefix tools/dailytogether && npm ci --prefix tools/uebungen && npm ci --prefix tools/pedia && npm ci --prefix tools/guide
scripts.build:tools: npm run build --prefix tools/kalorienrechner && npm run build --prefix tools/makrorechner && npm run build --prefix tools/dailytogether && npm run build --prefix tools/uebungen && npm run build --prefix tools/pedia && npm run build --prefix tools/guide
